Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to process numeric pattern. Events: Starting with idle (temp 20, pressure1, vibration0, flow0, pos0, energy low).

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then event4-6: temperature rising to 50-58, pressure 1-1.5, vibration 30-38, flow5, tool pos increasing 5-10, energy increasing 2-3. This looks like cutting (high temperature, vibration, flow).

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then events7-8: temperature drops to 40, pressure2, vibration10, flow2, pos15, energy2. This maybe assembling? Moderate temp, pressure higher, flow lower.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then event9: temperature spikes to 80, pressure2, vibration50, flow0, pos15, energy5. This maybe welding (high temp, high vibration, no flow).

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then event10-12: temperature drops to 30-25, pressure1, vibration low to 5, flow 0-1, pos15-20, energy ~1-1.6. This maybe quality inspection (low activity, some flow, tool position moving).

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then events13-15: back to idle (temp20-21, pressure1, vibration0, flow0, pos0, energy low).

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we have phases: idle (events1-3,13-15), cutting (4-6), assembling (7-8), welding (9), quality inspection (10-12).

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Provide rationale. We need to output labeled activities with explanation. Provide group event numbers. Well produce answer.
